name: company
label: Acme Corp — Company Knowledge Base
description: Personnel, structure, projects and culture of a fictional tech company.
observations: Alice Chen is the CEO of Acme Corp
Bob Martinez is the CTO of Acme Corp
Carol White is the Head of Product at Acme Corp
David Kim is the Lead Engineer at Acme Corp
Alice Chen reports directly to the board of directors
Bob Martinez manages the entire engineering department
Carol White reports to Alice Chen
David Kim reports to Bob Martinez
Acme Corp was founded in 2018 in San Francisco
Acme Corp builds industrial automation software
Acme Corp has 120 employees across three offices
The engineering team at Acme Corp has 45 engineers
Acme Corp's main product is called AutoFlow
AutoFlow is a workflow automation platform for factories
AutoFlow integrates with robotics systems via REST APIs
Acme Corp raised a Series B of 40 million dollars in 2023
The main investor in Acme Corp is Sequoia Capital
Acme Corp is profitable since Q3 2024
Alice Chen previously worked at Google for eight years
Bob Martinez has a PhD in computer science from MIT
Carol White joined Acme Corp from Stripe in 2021
David Kim built the core AutoFlow engine from scratch
Acme Corp uses Python and Rust for backend services
Acme Corp uses React for all frontend applications
The engineering culture at Acme Corp values small focused teams
Acme Corp has weekly all-hands meetings every Monday
Alice Chen prefers written communication over meetings
Bob Martinez insists on code reviews for every pull request
Acme Corp has a zero-bug policy for production releases
AutoFlow processes over two million tasks per day
test_queries: Who is the CEO of Acme Corp?
How much funding did Acme Corp raise?
